hero.sub: A ready-made bot-store with catalog, cart, and convenient admin panel. Launch sales without a website.

features.heading: Everything you need to sell
features.sub: No extra platforms — everything works inside Telegram, where your customers already are.
features.f1desc: Categories, photos, descriptions, prices. A beautiful store right inside the messenger. Customers never leave Telegram.
features.f2desc: Convenient cart, address input, delivery selection — all without leaving Telegram.
features.f3desc: Add products, change banners and manage orders right from the bot.
features.f4desc: Instant alerts for every new order directly in Telegram.
features.f5desc: Cash, online via Telegram Payments, or bank transfer.
features.f6desc: Set up promo banners on the main page for sales and special offers. Change in one click right from the bot.

demo.heading: Try it yourself
demo.sub: Switch between modes and interact with the bot — this is a real interface.
demo.hintClient: 💡 Add products to cart and place orders
demo.hintAdmin: ⚙️ Manage products, banners and view statistics

hiw.heading: Launch in 3 steps
hiw.s1desc: Fill in the form. Specify your store name and preferences.
hiw.s2desc: We'll configure the bot, add your products and style it to match your brand.
hiw.s3desc: Share the link with customers and receive orders right in Telegram.

pricing.heading: Transparent pricing
pricing.sub: No hidden fees or subscription costs.

form.heading: I want this store!
form.sub: Fill in the form and we'll contact you in Telegram within a few hours.
form.t1: ⚡ We'll respond within a few hours
form.successText: We'll write you in Telegram within a few hours.
form.alertEmpty: Please fill in your name and Telegram
